text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the summer camp's recreational activities
is making curry together.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Um... Hello, Teio. Hello, McQueen. I'm looking
forward to cooking with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The pleasure is mine. Never fear, I will make a
curry befitting a daughter of the Mejiro Family.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Me too! I'll make a curry so powerful, it'll wipe the
floor with McQueen's!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm glad I was put with you two. This will be
a breeze. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: McQueen, are you done washing the rice?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Almost! I've just finished my
three-hundred-and-eighth grain!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We are here to craft the perfect curry—which
means we must wash each and every individual
grain of rice until it sparkles.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there, McQueen. You're never gonna finish
cooking at that rate.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Check it out! I've already washed a thousand
grains myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?! Grrr... How could I lose to Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: All right. I'll do the washing.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Can you two please peel the potatoes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I beg your pardon? You're kicking me out in the
midst of my duties?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's not like that. I just need someone to take over
for me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I really need someone who's good with their
hands. Someone like you, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Then I shall happily take up the task.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I have the most nimble of fingers, after all. Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet wrangles the other two until the
curry is finally done.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! It's so good! Curry tastes ten times better
at the beach!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Heartily agreed! It made me hungry just looking
at it. And those potatoes I prepared were
sublime! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Finally... A break...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're telling me... But we really did make the
perfect curry... Thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as she says, their curry really is incredible.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I better be. I'll have you know, there's nothing I
can't do. Especially when it comes to household
chores.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
My parents were often away from home, so I had
to learn to do everything myself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I figured that if I could be the perfect daughter,
they would have a lot less to worry about.
choice_data_list: A model student in and out of school, huh?
A model student in and out of school, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...If you want to put it like that, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Scarlet! What should we do about cleaning
up?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Just a second. I'll be there in a moment!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Really? I'd appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I guess training isn't the only thing I can rely on
you for.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph, let's not get carried away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I wash the dishes with Daiwa Scarlet and
the others.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? What was that, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Nothing! Nothing at all. You're imagining things.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Now, now, don't be so timid! Let me hear it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If you're too shy, how about we go over there,
where no one will hear you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hear you scream, that is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I'm going to end up apologizing one
way or another.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet tells me she'll only let me off the
hook if I wash the dishes in her place.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's right! You're also gonna be in the
Shuka Sho, right Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Naturally, but... Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I just realized that you'll be up against Vodka
again!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Good luck, then! I'll be rooting for you both!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh? Interesting...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You heard that, right? Vodka's entering the
Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is the chance I've been waiting for! Finally, I'll
show her what's what!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Let's go for gold! The number one spot is as
good as ours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so we prepare to compete against Vodka on
a new stage.
